attacking_style: Not primarily an attacker; demonstrates exceptional time trial ability with technical course navigation and negative split execution in ITTs up to 15km.
team_tactics: Insufficient data to determine team tactical setup patterns across multiple races.
terrain_preference: Technical time trials where bike handling and pacing strategy matter; 48km/h average on technical 15km course suggests strength in rolling, corner-heavy TT parcours.
vulnerability: Appears to struggle in road race positioning (19th on GC before ITT); unclear ability to defend time trial gains in subsequent mountain or bunch sprint stages.
key_patterns: Hidden time trial capability: can produce WorldTour-winning ITT performances unexpectedly from low GC positions.
Negative split specialist: executes superior pacing strategy in technical time trials.
Technical ITT strength: thrives on courses requiring bike handling, not just pure power output.
form_trajectory: unknown: Single observation shows breakthrough ITT performance, but insufficient data on consistency or road race form development.
